name: @benten/admin-ui-v0
description: Admin UI v0 — Phase-4-Foundation R3 stub. Browser-wasm32 primary + Tauri 2.x embedded-webview secondary. Workflow editor + composed-view creator + plugin manager. Ships AS the first app-level plugin per CLAUDE.md baked-in #18. R3 RED-PHASE: tests use vitest 4.x Browser Mode (Playwright provider) for component/integration + standalone Playwright for top-of-pyramid E2E cross-origin/CSRF/Tauri-WebDriver-BiDi. Production logic lands at G24-A/B/C wave-6b.
